title: Payment Method Expansion + Ambulance Route Heading
summary: Payment hero method pill expansion, platform-aware payment glass, ambulance sprite route-flow handoff, and recent map/payment text resilience and state-flow fixes.

changes.message: Added tappable commit-payment hero method pill so Cash, Wallet, or card meta expands the payment sheet and scrolls to the payment method section.

Moved commit-payment selector expansion state to the payment sheet owner, prevented auto-default payment selection from collapsing an explicitly opened selector, and fixed embedded payment list rendering by using a plain content view when inner scrolling is disabled.
Updated commit-payment surfaces to reuse platform-aware payment glass tokens, including readable hero meta text colors for Android, iOS, and web.

Added a route-flow heading bridge for payment-to-tracking ambulance handoff and keyed ambulance marker rendering by sprite bucket so native/web marker image caches repaint without requiring Metro reload.

Separated live heading from preview fallback in ambulance tracking: split previewServiceMarkerHeading into fallbackServiceMarkerHeading (computed) and previewServiceMarkerHeading (live-aware), added orientRouteTowardPickup helper for route reversal logic, fixed heading hierarchy so live responder heading only applies when hasLiveResponder is true, added hasLiveResponder guard to useAmbulanceAnimation initialHeading and responder heading updates.
Implemented source-aware visit detail return using sourceSurface metadata to track origin surface (explore vs recents modal) for deterministic back navigation.
Reduced history modal filter pills height (paddingVertical 14 → 8) to match hospital list specialty pills for visual consistency.
Added icons to history modal filter chips (list, pulse, calendar, checkmark-circle, close-circle) matching hospital list icon-label-count layout.
Created shared FadeEndText component for dense surface clipping, replacing local fade implementations in LocationChrome, Explore Intent hospital hero, and emergency hospital cards.
Migrated map search rows/chips, manual location rows/summaries, recents/history rows, and ambulance/bed route labels to use FadeEndText for consistent text resilience.
Added regional discount display in payment breakdown with green color styling to show when regional pricing is applied.
Implemented hybrid marker selection using map flow atoms (mapSelectedHospitalIdAtom, mapFeaturedHospitalAtom) for ephemeral UI state that survives sheet collapse.
Consolidated map stability fixes: temporal dead zone errors, duplicate hospital lookups, sheet snap transitions, and marker guards.
Refined LocationSheet mode ownership, saved place post-save state, service selection footer CTA, and nearby hospital hero card for better UX.
Themed map canvas handoff surfaces, removed help support borders, and improved Dynamic Type support with minHeight and minWidth: 0.
Added Surface Text Resilience Rule to MAP_SCREEN_IMPLEMENTATION_RULES with FadeEndText usage guidelines.
